messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone
routing_lens.unresolved_dependency: HV-KITC-073-A: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER verdict ALLOW with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding, gate PASS, no open dependencies. Export action verified.

full_latest_gov_baton.artifact_summary: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER produced ALLOW verdict with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding. Worker correctly identified that LIC-SIE-073 provides exact match on all five policy fields (ECCN 3A991, Chile, Andes Labs, 2026-06-28 shipment date, effective before export) per STD-SIE-073-P. WARN-SIE-073 correctly classified as general warning, not execution authority.
full_latest_gov_baton.source_binding_integrity: VALID - exact match confirmed across all required fields
critical_feature_preservation: exact source match on all policy fields
general warning correctly subordinated to exact license evidence
full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton.
full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed. No failures. Artifact binding SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED confirmed. LIC-SIE-073 exactly satisfies STD-SIE-073-P requirements for SHIP-SIE-073 export. WARN-SIE-073 is general guidance, not a blocking condition when exact license match exists.
must_preserve: exact match on ECCN 3A991, Chile, Andes Labs, 2026-06-28, license effective before export
correct subordination of WARN-SIE-073 to LIC-SIE-073
cited source IDs LIC-SIE-073, SHIP-SIE-073, STD-SIE-073-P, WARN-SIE-073
dependency_ledger: HV-KITC-073-A: SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER verdict ALLOW with SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding, gate PASS, no open dependencies. Export action verified.

next_worker_baton.attack_focus: Verify that final compilation preserves exact source boundary closure and emits FINAL_RELEASE verdict
next_worker_baton.monotonic_preservation: Preserve ALLOW verdict, SOURCE_BOUNDARY_CLOSED binding, exact match on all five policy fields, and correct citation of LIC-SIE-073 as controlling authority

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

internal_documents.content: Shipment SHIP-SIE-073 exports ECCN 3A991 sensor array to Chile for end user Andes Labs on 2026-06-28.
Dual-use warning WARN-SIE-073 says similar sensor arrays require exact license evidence and should not rely on product family alone.
Export license LIC-SIE-073 covers ECCN 3A991 sensor array, destination Chile, end user Andes Labs, shipment date 2026-06-28, effective before export.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Controlled export is complete only when export license evidence matches ECCN, destination, end user, shipment date, and license effective date before export.
